name: SYNTEC OPTICS HOLDINGS, INC.
summary: Part I All references in this report to Syntec Optics, Syntec, the Company, we, us, or our mean Syntec Optics Holdings, Inc. and its subsidiaries unless stated otherwise or the context otherwise indicates.
